agent_raw: No methodological flaw. The empirical pre-analysis showing near-zero residual dependence at the 15-minute horizon, combined with the four-period blocked-random vs rolling-origin comparison, provides the required justification for departing from chronological evaluation. The evaluation plan was pre-specified on this basis. The scope is correctly limited to the short-horizon nightly-retrained regime. Applying the chronological-split heuristic rigidly without examining the residual dependence structure would be over-application of a rule intended for cases where temporal structure matters — which the pre-analysis demonstrates is not the case here at the 15-minute horizon.
